mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.resource_unit_id, s.resource_unit_name, s.region, s.longitude, s.latitude, s.address, s.capacity_kwp, ss.status, ss.realtime_power_kw, ss.today_energy_kwh, ss.today_revenue_cny, ss.availability, ss.health_grade, ss.snapshot_time FROM dashboard_station s JOIN dashboard_station_status_snapshot ss ON ss.station_id = s.id ORDER BY s.id
